Jenang Gemi

Official website for Jenang Gemi.

Public pages:
- Home: https://jenanggemi.com/
- Bubur Gemi: https://jenanggemi.com/bubur.html
- Jamu Gemi: https://jenanggemi.com/jamu.html
- Program Kemitraan Jenang Gemi: https://jenanggemi.com/program-kemitraan.html
- Tentang Kami: https://jenanggemi.com/about.html
- FAQ: https://jenanggemi.com/faq.html

Search indexing guidance:
- Index the public partnership overview page at https://jenanggemi.com/program-kemitraan.html
- Do not index the private pricing/details page at https://jenanggemi.com/kemitraan.html
